hypothesis: H-02: Stella V5 embedder (dunzhang/stella_en_1.5B_v5) recall@10 >= bge-m3 LongMemEval baseline (0.9334)
run_failed_detail: Stella V5 inference requires PyTorch (dunzhang/stella_en_1.5B_v5 uses AutoModel + trust_remote_code). torch is not installed in agent execution environment. Additionally LONGMEMEVAL_DATA_DIR (full LongMemEval dataset ~47.7 sessions/item, n=500) is not available in bench DB. Both blockers must be resolved before a real bench run is possible.

blockers.resolution: pip install torch>=2.0 in bench venv (or use machine with GPU/MPS)

blockers.description: LongMemEval dataset not available in agent env
blockers.error: LONGMEMEVAL_DATA_DIR not set; dataset requires ~47.7 sessions/item, n=500
blockers.resolution: Set LONGMEMEVAL_DATA_DIR to LongMemEval cleaned dataset path (xiaowu0162/longmemeval-cleaned)

implement_h02_evidence: transformers==4.44.2 pin present in benchmarks/longmemeval/requirements.txt (rope_theta compatibility fix for Stella V5 bundled modeling_qwen.py)
significance_test_note: significance_test.py not invocable — no candidate metrics produced (run failed before bench execution)

projected_results_from_blocked_run.projection_confidence: medium — based on MTEB BEIR gap analysis, not live bench

action_required: ESCALATE — re-run on machine with PyTorch + LongMemEval dataset. Recommend pgmnemo dev machine (MPS, transformers==4.44.2, full dataset). See blockers B1/B2 above.
